reforms.description: A comprehensive policy strategy called 'Chile Emprende Contigo' was launched in 2007 to simplify the regulatory framework for SMEs, facilitate their access to credit, and foster entrepreneurship and competitiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying regulations and improving access to credit, the initiative aims to enhance the competitiveness of SMEs, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy was launched to address the main difficulties of the SME sector.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change aimed at improving the business environment for SMEs, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic development.
reforms.source_quote: A comprehensive policy strategy (Chile Emprende Contigo) was launched in 2007 to address the main difficulties of the SME sector by seeking to simplify the regulatory framework for these enterprises, facilitate their access to credit and foster entrepreneurship and competitiveness.

reforms.description: Chile is taking steps to improve access to education and the quality of services to enhance the supply of skilled scientists, which is crucial for meeting the demand from innovative businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving education and skills will enhance human capital, leading to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The authorities are well aware that policy action in this area is of paramount importance.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses a fundamental issue in the economy by enhancing the education system to produce skilled workers, which is essential for long-term economic growth and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The success of policies that have been put in place since 2003 in the area of support for innovation will depend on whether the higher education system will be able to increase the supply of skilled scientists.

reforms.description: The introduction of a simplified tax system for SMEs in 2007 aims to reduce the time and cost of filing taxes, thereby encouraging formalization and compliance.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying tax compliance for SMEs can enhance their operational efficiency and encourage formalization, leading to greater economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: A simplified system was introduced in 2007 for SMEs to reduce their time and cost of filing taxes.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant improvement in the tax compliance process for SMEs, which is crucial for enhancing their contribution to the economy.
reforms.source_quote: A simplified system was introduced in 2007 for SMEs to reduce their time and cost of filing taxes.

reforms.description: The extension of compulsory schooling to lower-secondary education in 2003 resulted in 12 years of compulsory education, which is likely to have a positive impact on female participation and employability.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing educational attainment enhances the skill level of the workforce, which can lead to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform resulted in 12 years of compulsory education.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the education system, aiming to improve human capital and labor market outcomes.
reforms.source_quote: The extension of compulsory schooling to lower-secondary education in 2003, resulting in 12 years of compulsory education, is likely to have a positive impact on female participation and employability.

reforms.description: The Chilean authorities plan to boost government support for R&D, particularly through the allocation of revenue from the taxation of mining companies introduced in 2005, to encourage enterprises to innovate more.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased government support for R&D is expected to stimulate innovation and productivity growth in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The authorities plan to boost government support for R&D.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in government policy towards enhancing R&D funding, which is crucial for improving innovation performance in Chile.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities plan to boost government support for R&D.

reforms.description: The introduction of tax breaks for innovation aims to encourage enterprises to invest in R&D and innovation activities, which have been used sparingly in the past.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Tax incentives are expected to lower the cost of innovation for firms, thereby encouraging more investment in R&D and innovation activities.
reforms.status_evidence: The use of newly introduced tax breaks for innovation is planned.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the introduction of tax breaks is a narrower reform aimed at enhancing existing innovation policies rather than a complete overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The 2005Survey recommended the use of tax incentives for innovation.

reforms.description: The MKII Law, promulgated in June 2007, introduces tax incentives for seed and risk capital investment, allowing banks to invest in risk capital ventures and facilitating the creation of risk capital funds.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing tax incentives and facilitating investment in risk capital, the reform aims to enhance the availability of funding for innovative startups, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The MKII Law was promulgated and is in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The MKII Law represents a significant structural change in the approach to risk capital investment, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship in the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The MKII Law... introduces tax incentives for seed and risk capital investment, allows banks to invest in risk capital ventures...

reforms.description: The Innovation Council has recommended that innovation policy focus on CORFO for business innovation and support for applied research, while CONICYT will support basic research, aiming to reduce fragmentation in government support.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining government support for innovation, the reform aims to enhance the effectiveness and efficiency of public funding, thereby promoting innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Efforts are ongoing to standardise the existing research grant mechanisms within CONICYT.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to consolidate and improve the delivery of government support for innovation, which is essential for enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: The Innovation Council has recommended that innovation policy focus on CORFO for business innovation and support for applied research...

reforms.description: A management unit was created in CONICYT to streamline internal procedures and elaborate innovation indicators and scoreboards, improving the governance and cost-effectiveness of innovation funds.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the governance of innovation funds, the reform aims to ensure better allocation of resources, which can lead to more effective support for innovative projects.
reforms.status_evidence: Efforts are under way to increase the share of grants allocated by CORFO in a contestable manner.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is important as it seeks to improve the management of innovation funds, which is critical for enhancing the impact of public investment in innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A management unit was created in CONICYT to streamline internal procedures and elaborate innovation indicators and scoreboards.

reforms.description: Chile introduced a reduction in the withholding tax on transfers of intellectual property to encourage investment in R&D, lowering it from 20-30% to 15%. Additionally, a tax credit of 35% on R&D spending is available for enterprises that contract with accredited research centers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reduction in tax burdens on R&D investments is expected to stimulate private sector innovation and increase overall R&D spending.
reforms.status_evidence: The new tax measures have been put into effect to foster innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the tax policy aimed at enhancing R&D investment, which is crucial for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: To encourage investment in R&D, the withholding tax due on transfers of intellectual property was reduced to 15% of expenditure from the current level of 20-30%.

reforms.description: Chile is taking measures to strengthen incentives for innovation through gradual reductions in stamp duties, as recommended in previous surveys.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing stamp duties is expected to enhance the efficiency of the tax system, thereby encouraging innovation and investment.
reforms.status_evidence: Measures are being taken to gradually reduce the stamp duties.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant step towards improving the tax environment for innovation, although it is not a comprehensive overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Measures are being taken to gradually reduce the stamp duties, which are welcome, and to strengthen incentives for innovation.
